all.description: Export issues, wikis, and documents from Backlog as Markdown files

examples.excludeDocuments: Export everything except documents (issues and wikis)
examples.issueKeyFileName: Use issue key as file name
examples.issueKeyFolderAndFileName: Create folders by issue key and use issue key as file name
examples.outputDir: Save issues, wikis, and documents to the specified directory
examples.saveAll: Save issues, wikis, and documents as Markdown files

messages.noTargetsAfterExclusion: No targets remaining after exclusion. Please specify valid targets to export.
messages.onlyExcludeConflict: Cannot use both --only and --exclude flags together. Please use only one.

document.description: Export documents from Backlog as Markdown files

examples.keyword: Export only documents containing the keyword "仕様書" (specification)
examples.outputDir: Save documents to the specified directory

issue.description: Export issues from Backlog as Markdown files

examples.issueKeyFileName: Use issue key as file name
examples.issueKeyFolderAndFileName: Create folders by issue key and use issue key as file name
examples.outputDir: Save issues to the specified directory
examples.statusId: Export only issues with the specified status IDs

messages.commentFetchFailed: Failed to fetch comments for issue {{issueKey}}: {{errorMessage}}
messages.processingSinceLastUpdate: Processing {{count}} issues updated since last update ({{lastUpdated}}).

args.directory: Target directory for update (where settings file is stored)

update.description: Fetch and update the latest data from Backlog

examples.currentDir: Update using the settings in the current directory
examples.issueKeyFileName: Use issue key as file name
examples.issueKeyFolderAndFileName: Create folders by issue key and use issue key as file name
examples.specifyDir: Update using the settings in the specified directory
examples.specifyParams: Update with specified parameters (overwrites settings file if it exists)

messages.apiKeyMissing: {{targetDir}}: API key not specified. Set it with --apiKey flag or BACKLOG_API_KEY environment variable.
messages.confirmSettings: Update will be executed with the following settings:
messages.projectMissing: {{targetDir}}: Project ID or key not specified. Skipping.

flags.documentId: Re-fetch only the specified documents by ID (comma-separated for multiple)
flags.issueIdOrKey: Re-fetch only the specified issues by ID or key (comma-separated for multiple)
flags.wikiId: Re-fetch only the specified wikis by ID (comma-separated for multiple)

wiki.description: Export wikis from Backlog as Markdown files

examples.outputDir: Save wikis to the specified directory

messages.processingSinceLastUpdate: Processing {{count}} wikis updated since last update ({{lastUpdated}}).

prune.description: Delete local files for documents and wikis that were deleted or moved on Backlog, aligning the local copy with Backlog

args.directory: Target directory (where the settings file is stored)

examples.currentDir: Search for settings files under the current directory and delete local document files that no longer exist on Backlog
examples.force: Skip the confirmation prompt and delete

messages.nonInteractive: Aborted because interactive confirmation is not possible (stdin is not a terminal). Use the --force flag to skip confirmation.
messages.confirmHeader: In the following directory, local document/wiki .md files that no longer exist on Backlog will be deleted:
messages.folderTypeMissing: {{dir}}: skipped because the settings file has no folderType (running the update command will save it)
messages.orphanDeleted: Deleted a {{label}} that no longer exists on Backlog: {{path}}
messages.confirmingFileNames: Confirming canonical file names for {{count}} documents...
messages.documentListFetchFailed: Failed to fetch the document list. Aborting without deleting anything to prevent accidental deletion: {{errorMessage}}

flags.apiKey: Backlog API key (can also be read from BACKLOG_API_KEY environment variable)
flags.exclude: Exclude the specified types, separated by commas (e.g., 'documents,wiki')
flags.issueKeyFileName: Use issue key as file name
flags.maxCount: Maximum number of issues to fetch at once (default: 5000)
flags.only: Export only the specified types, separated by commas (e.g., 'issues,wiki')

messages.apiKeyFromEnv: Using API key from BACKLOG_API_KEY environment variable
messages.apiKeyNotFound: API key not found. Please provide it with --apiKey flag or BACKLOG_API_KEY environment variable
messages.failedToGetProjectId: Failed to get project ID from project key "{{projectKey}}": {{errorMessage}}
messages.rateLimitWait: Waiting 15 seconds to avoid rate limiting...
